seoTitle: Hammond Park vs Hannans — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hammond Park and Hannans. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hammond Park vs Hannans: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hammond Park and Hannans.
heading: Hammond Park vs Hannans — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hammond Park, Western Australia and Hannans, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hannans has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Hammond Park (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hammond Park or Hannans safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hammond Park has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Hannans scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hammond Park scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Hannans scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hammond Park or Hannans?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hannans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
